content: Phase 1: Shared public shell — PublicLayout, PublicHeader, PublicMenuOverlay (route-based), FooterMega, primitives (PageHero, Reveal, SectionLabel, AssetCard), public.css
Phase 1: Wire routes in App.js under PublicLayout (/ /how /assets /calculator /contacts /otc /app)
Phase 2: Build /how (Принцип роботи та безпека) page
Phase 2: Build /assets (каталог + раунди, live data) page
Phase 2: Refactor LandingPage into selling teasers (remove own header/footer + deep sections)
Phase 2: Strip internal headers/footers from /otc, /otc/:id, /app (use shared shell)
Phase 3: End-to-end testing via testing agent (menu nav, all pages, forms)
